name: @pryzm/plugin-furniture
description: PRYZM 2 — Furniture plugin (S27 / ADR-0027). 7 handlers: CreateFurniture / DeleteFurniture / MoveFurniture / RotateFurniture / SetFurnitureScale / SetActiveLod / SetFurnitureRepresentation. Multi-representation: every Furniture DTO carries up to 5 LOD-keyed geometries; the producer reads the active one. Hosts a headless FurnitureCatalogue for the carousel.
